home.title: Shoppingmart Exports | Global Sourcing Platform
home.description: Shoppingmart Exports helps buyers source Indian products with documented export workflows, quality checks, and shipment coordination.

compliance.title: Compliance | Shoppingmart Exports

contact.title: Contact | Shoppingmart Exports

hero.title: Global sourcing. Clearly handled.
hero.copy: Products, documents, and logistics handled with clarity.

intro.title: Source products with fewer handoffs and cleaner export paperwork.
intro.copy: Shoppingmart Exports connects product discovery, supplier coordination, quality checkpoints, packing, and freight readiness into one transparent workflow for overseas buyers.

products.title: Built around products buyers can reorder.
products.copy: Start with priority product lines, then expand into custom sourcing once the documentation and quality expectations are aligned.

consumerGoods.title: Consumer Goods
consumerGoods.description: Home, lifestyle, daily-use, and retail-ready products with packaging coordination.

foodStaples.title: Food and Staples
foodStaples.description: Packaged food, grains, spices, and shelf-stable categories with document checks.

textiles.title: Textiles
textiles.description: Garments, fabrics, and made-ups sourced around samples, sizing, and repeat lots.

customSourcing.title: Custom Sourcing
customSourcing.description: Buyer-led product discovery for private label, bulk purchase, or mixed container needs.

process.title: A clear path from enquiry to shipment readiness.
process.copy: Every order moves through visible checkpoints, so importers know what is being sourced, checked, documented, and prepared for dispatch.

requirements.title: Requirement capture
requirements.description: Product, target market, packaging, certificates, and quantity expectations are documented first.

supplier.title: Supplier and sample check
supplier.description: Shortlisted supply options are compared on specification fit, pricing, lead time, and repeatability.

export.title: Export preparation
export.description: Packing, invoices, shipment coordination, and required trade documents are prepared for review.

compliance.title: Compliance-aware sourcing for EU-facing exports.
compliance.copy: The EU and India concluded Free Trade Agreement negotiations on 27 January 2026. We track this development without overclaiming: the published text is still subject to legal revision, signature, and each side's internal entry-into-force procedures.
compliance.statusTitle: Negotiations concluded, legal entry into force still matters.
compliance.statusCopy: The agreement is positioned as the largest trade agreement concluded by either side and is expected to reduce tariffs on more than 96% of EU goods exports. For import and export planning, we still treat rules of origin, customs facilitation, SPS, technical barriers to trade, and product-specific obligations as mandatory checks.

statusItems.concluded: FTA negotiations concluded on 27 January 2026 after the 2022 relaunch.
statusItems.informational: Commission-published legal texts remain informational until signature and internal procedures are complete.
statusItems.indiaRelease: India's official release highlights preferential access for more than 99% of Indian exports by trade value to the EU.

gdpr.title: GDPR-minded enquiry handling
gdpr.description: We collect only the trade details needed for quotation, shipment planning, and importer communication.

origin.title: Origin and customs discipline
origin.description: Product classification, invoice data, packing records, and origin evidence are treated as order-critical records.

readiness.title: EU product readiness
readiness.description: We prepare buyer discussions around applicable documentation, labelling, SPS, technical standards, and market-specific checks.

quote.title: Tell us what you need. We will prepare the next step.
quote.copy: Share the essentials for product sourcing, documentation, and shipment planning. We keep enquiry details focused on quotation follow-up.

fields.name: Full name
fields.privacy: I agree to be contacted about this quotation request and understand the details are used for enquiry follow-up.

placeholders.contactDetails: Phone, WhatsApp, or preferred contact time
placeholders.message: Product details, target quantity, packaging, destination, certificates, or timeline.

quote.note: The form creates a structured quotation JSON payload. For now it is queued locally; next we can post the same payload to the backend.

result.prepared: Prepared on {{ date }}. Request ID: {{ requestId }}.
result.draftSaved: Draft autosaved on {{ date }}. The final submit creates the backend-ready JSON object.
result.draftEmpty: The form currently keeps a browser draft. Submit creates the JSON contract for backend storage.
result.emptyTitle: Send the essentials. We will handle the next step.
result.emptyDescription: Share your product, destination, quantity, and contact details. Your draft is kept locally for now and can later be posted to your database with the same payload shape.
result.readyTitle: {{ name }}, this enquiry is ready for review.
result.readyDescription: We will prepare {{ volumeFocus }} for {{ category }} into {{ market }}, plus product specifications, packaging, certificates, and {{ complianceFocus }}.
result.submissionDescription: {{ contactName }}, request {{ requestId }} is ready for backend storage and sales follow-up at {{ email }}.

complianceFocus.eu: GDPR-minded communication, origin evidence, and importer document checks

errors.email: Enter a valid business email address.

footer.copy: Global sourcing platform for export-ready product supply.

hero.title: Compliance-aware exports from India to Europe.
hero.copy: Shoppingmart Exports prepares sourcing conversations with EU buyer expectations in mind: data protection, origin records, customs documents, product standards, and transparent shipment files.

globe.aria: Animated trade route from India to Europe
globe.title: India to Europe shipping route
globe.description: A cargo ship animates from India through multiple trade destinations before reaching Europe.

agreement.title: EU-India FTA negotiations are concluded, but legal finalization still matters.
agreement.copy: The European Commission states that FTA negotiations concluded on 27 January 2026. The published text is informational, may still be legally revised, and becomes binding only after signature and each side completes the required internal procedures. We use that status as a planning signal, not as a shortcut around compliance.

readiness.title: A practical compliance model for export enquiries.
readiness.copy: We do not treat compliance as a final paperwork step. It starts at product selection, supplier qualification, market fit, and order documentation.

gdpr.title: GDPR and DSGVO respect
gdpr.description: We design enquiry flows around data minimization, purpose limitation, access control, and clear buyer communication.

origin.title: Rules of origin readiness
origin.description: Supplier declarations, product origin evidence, HS classification, and invoice records are treated as core export inputs.

documentation.title: EU market documentation
documentation.description: We prepare product discussions around labelling, safety documentation, SPS needs, technical standards, and importer review.

records.title: Responsible trade records
records.description: Commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates, and shipment milestones are structured for repeat orders and auditability.

checklist.title: Buyer-ready compliance checklist.
checklist.copy: Expand this checklist during an enquiry call to keep the discussion concrete and evidence-led.

fta.label: FTA status check
fta.details: EU-India FTA negotiations concluded on 27 January 2026, but product planning must still respect final legal text, signature, and entry-into-force status.

product.label: Product-specific compliance
product.details: Food, textiles, consumer goods, and regulated products can trigger different EU documentation, labelling, safety, or sanitary requirements.

customs.label: Customs and origin file
customs.details: Each order should maintain classification, origin evidence, supplier records, commercial invoice, packing list, and shipment terms.

data.label: Data handling
data.details: Buyer and supplier contact details should be collected only when needed and handled under GDPR-minded retention and access practices.

sources.title: Trade status checked against official sources.

hero.title: Talk to our export team.
hero.copy: Send your product, destination, quantity, and timeline. Our sales team will review the enquiry and contact you soon.
hero.cardCopy: Use this address for quotation requests, buyer enquiries, supplier coordination, and shipment follow-up.

info.title: Clear details make faster quotations.
info.productCopy: Category, specification, packaging, certification needs, and target quality level.
info.orderCopy: Quantity, destination market, delivery timeline, and preferred shipment size.
info.contactCopy: Company name, buyer contact, email, phone or WhatsApp, and preferred response time.
